commands.name: clean
commands.description: Remove fable_modules folders and files with specified extension (default .fs.js)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Print version

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Working directory

options.name: --outDir
options.description: Redirect compilation output to a directory

options.name: --extension
options.description: Extension for generated JS files (default .fs.js)

options.name: --sourceMaps
options.description: Enable source maps

options.name: --sourceMapsRoot
options.description: Set the value of the `sourceRoot` property in generated source maps

options.name: --define
options.description:
Defines a symbol for use in conditional compilation
-c|--configurationThe configuration to use when parsing .fsproj with MSBuild,
default is 'Debug' in watch mode, or 'Release' otherwise

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print more info during compilation

options.name: --silent
options.description: Don't print any log during compilation

options.name: --typedArrays
options.description: Compile numeric arrays as JS typed arrays (default true)

options.name: --watch
options.description: Alias of watch command

options.name: --watchDelay
options.description: Delay in ms before recompiling after a file changes (default 200)

options.name: --run
options.description: The command after the argument will be executed after compilation

options.name: --runFast
options.description: The command after the argument will be executed BEFORE compilation

options.name: --runWatch
options.description: Like run, but will execute after each watch compilation

options.name: --runScript
options.description:
Runs the generated script for last file with node
(Requires `"type": "module"` in package.json and at minimum Node.js 12.20, 14.14, or 16.0.0)

options.name: --yes
options.description: Automatically reply 'yes' (e.g. with `clean` command)

options.name: --noRestore
options.description: Skip `dotnet restore`

options.name: --noCache
options.description: Recompile all files, including sources from packages

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Don't merge sources of referenced projects with specified pattern
(Intended for plugin development)

options.name: --optimize
options.description:
Compile with optimized F# AST (experimental)
--lang|--language Compile to JavaScript (default), TypeScript, Php or Python.
Support for TypeScript, Php and Python is experimental.
Environment variables:
DOTNET_USE_POLLING_FILE_WATCHER
When set to '1' or 'true', Fable watch will poll the file system for
changes. This is required for some file systems, such as network shares,
Docker mounted volumes, and other virtual file systems.
